mapper.select: SELECT table1.*, table2.name as userName, table2.photoUrl, CASE WHEN table3.t1commentId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as liked FROM joinping.t1comment table1 INNER JOIN joinping.user table2 ON table1.userId = table2.id LEFT JOIN joinping.t1comment_user_like table3 ON table1.id = table3.t1commentId AND table3.userId = #{userId} AND table3.status = 0 WHERE table1.thingId = #{thingId} AND table1.status = 0 ORDER BY table1.likeNum DESC, table1.replyNum DESC, table1.id DESC

SELECT table1.*, table2.name as userName, table2.photoUrl, CASE WHEN table3.t1commentId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as liked FROM joinping.t1comment table1 INNER JOIN joinping.user table2 ON table1.userId = table2.id LEFT JOIN joinping.t1comment_user_like table3 ON table1.id = table3.t1commentId AND table3.userId = #{userId} AND table3.status = 0 WHERE table1.thingId = #{thingId} AND table1.status = 0 ORDER BY table1.id DESC

SELECT table1.*, table2.name as userName, table2.photoUrl, CASE WHEN table3.t1commentId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as liked FROM joinping.t1comment table1 INNER JOIN joinping.user table2 ON table1.userId = table2.id LEFT JOIN joinping.t1comment_user_like table3 ON table1.id = table3.t1commentId AND table3.userId = #{userId} AND table3.status = 0 WHERE table1.id = #{id} AND table1.status = 0
